name: ARILSetAutoStartParam
title: ARILSetAutoStartParam
description: This function influences the start behavior. The function must be called in
on preStart, otherwise it will not have any effect.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The value defines the desired start behaviour: 0: IL will start in state waiting (see Interaction Layer State Model). The IL can be activated by calling ARILControlResume. 1: IL will start in state suspended (see Interaction Layer State Model). The IL can be activated by calling ARILControlStart. This is the same effect as calling function ARILControlInit in on preStart. 2: IL will start in state running (see Interaction Layer State Model). PDUs will be sent. This is the default, when the function is not called.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
